page.content: In Fiscal Year 2024, Lockheed Martin's supply chain analysis reveals critical metrics across various materials: MaterialA has a lead time of 30 days with a cost of CNY150,000 for materials, CNY50,000 for labor, and transportation costs not specified; MaterialB has a lead time of 45 days with a material cost of CNY200,000, labor at CNY60,000, and unspecified transportation; MaterialC has a lead time of 60 days, incurring CNY250,000 for materials, CNY75,000 for labor, and unspecified transportation; MaterialD shows a lead time of 30 days with costs of CNY100,000 for materials, CNY40,000 for labor, and unspecified transportation; MaterialE has a lead time of 50 days with a material cost of CNY300,000, labor at CNY90,000, and unspecified transportation. The total lead time stands at 45 days with a total cost of CNY1,080,000 and an average lead time of 42 days. Average cost is CNY216,000, projected costs are CNY1,200,000 with a projected lead time of 48 days.

lines.text: In Fiscal Year 2024, Lockheed Martin's supply chain analysis reveals critical metrics across various materials: MaterialA has a
lead time of 30 days with a cost of CNY150,000 for materials, CNY50,000 for labor, and transportation costs not specified;
MaterialB has a lead time of 45 days with a material cost of CNY200,000, labor at CNY60,000, and unspecified transportation;
MaterialC has a lead time of 60 days, incurring CNY250,000 for materials, CNY75,000 for labor, and unspecified
transportation; MaterialD shows a lead time of 30 days with costs of CNY100,000 for materials, CNY40,000 for labor, and
unspecified transportation; MaterialE has a lead time of 50 days with a material cost of CNY300,000, labor at CNY90,000, and
unspecified transportation. The total lead time stands at 45 days with a total cost of CNY1,080,000 and an average lead time of
42 days. Average cost is CNY216,000, projected costs are CNY1,200,000 with a projected lead time of 48 days.

page.content: Previous year costs were CNY1,000,000 with a previous lead time of 40 days and a variance of +CNY200,000. Revenue for the period is CNY1.5B with 2,500 units sold and a headcount of 1,500.

lines.text: Previous year costs were CNY1,000,000 with a previous lead time of 40 days and a variance of +CNY200,000. Revenue for the
period is CNY1.5B with 2,500 units sold and a headcount of 1,500.

page.content: In Q1 2024, revenue is CNY300M from 500 units and 200 headcount; Q2 2024 generates CNY400M from 600 units and 250 headcount; Q3 2024 contributes CNY500M from 700 units and 300 headcount; Q4 2024 rounds out with CNY300M from 400 units and 150 headcount, totaling CNY1.5B and 2,500 units sold.
